mechanism_narrative: A 5-month increase in industrial production signals a strengthening demand environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The 5-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in the unemployment rate above 4.5% signals a weakening labor market that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The 20-day forward returns in weakening labor market periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month decline in housing starts below 1400k signals a weakening supply environment that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The 60-day forward returns in weakening supply periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in real disposable personal income above 370k signals a strengthening demand environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The 20-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month rise in payroll employment above 137k signals a weakening labor market that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The 5-day forward returns in weakening labor market periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month decline in the federal funds rate below 5.2% signals an easing monetary cycle that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The 20-day forward returns in easing monetary periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in industrial production and a 2-month increase in real disposable personal income signals a strengthening demand environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The 60-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month rise in the unemployment rate above 4.5% and a 1-month rise in payroll employment above 137k signals a weakening labor market that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The 20-day forward returns in weakening labor market periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
